infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Officetracker uses your location to detect when you arrive at work so it can mark the day as an office day.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Officetracker checks for arrival at your work location in the background so it can automatically mark office days, even when the app is closed.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Officetracker checks for arrival at your work location in the background so it can automatically mark office days, even when the app is closed.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Officetracker uses your location to detect when you arrive at work so it can mark the day as an office day.
